description: Ranked 7th in the National Examination (UN) across the entire graduating cohort.
Consistently ranked within the Top 10 of the class.
Ranked 2nd consistently from Grade 10 to 12; Selected as an Eligible Student for SNBP (National Selection Based on Academic Merit).
GPA 3.4 of 4.0; Currently in the 6th semester, actively focused on electronics and automation engineering systems.
